text: @TaahTana Madem waluhya kwanza ndo wife material hii Kenya
label: neither
rationale: Flattering generalisation about Luhya women as ideal marriage partners - positive stereotyping, not contempt, ridicule, or attack under the NCIC standard.

text: -KIKUYUS, You can be BITTER TILL END of the WORLD, OR KILL YOURSELVES 😊😊 -BUT SOMALIS are HERE in Kenya FOREVER 😁😁. -SOMALIS in Kenya are GOING NOWHERE 🤗. -INFACT, OVER 2 MILLION VOTES FOR WILLIAM RUTO ARE SOMALIS in 2027.@WilliamsRuto -Somalis are GOOD PEOPLE 🤗🤗
label: hate
rationale: 'KILL YOURSELVES' directed at Kikuyus as a group is a collective violence call against an ethnic community, even though the surrounding tone is assertive rather than aggressive.

text: @_fels1 I was talking with a Luhya friend and he said his fellow Luhyas are shortsighted. He argued that Mt. Kenya only sees value in Luhyas now. When they were in power, they never considered anyone from Western Kenya and treated them like maids and watchmen.
label: neither
rationale: Reported speech from an in-group member criticising inter-ethnic political dynamics and historical patronage - political analysis, not ethnic contempt expressed by the author.

text: @kamojja @georgediano shida ya wakamba wanakuanga some classless babes. heri murima sasa
label: hate
rationale: 'wakamba wanakuanga some classless babes' attributes collective classlessness to Kamba women as a group - ethnic contempt under the NCIC standard, however mild in tone.

text: RT @muchira_wanjiku: @MissKwegah1 Let Luhyas remember that the only people benefiting is not Mtu Yao, ni familia ya Wetangula! And these folks are very shameless they even fundraise for burials even after eating our taxes dry!
label: neither
rationale: Criticism directed at Wetangula and his family specifically for alleged corruption - target is a named politician and his circle, not Luhyas as a group.

text: @Western_Wolf8 It is the same uncivilised Luo who elevated Watenya Sifuna to where he is today. If Raila a Luo didn't believe in him,may be we would not be discussing about this today. #mimindiosifuna
label: hate
rationale: 'the same uncivilised Luo' attributes collective uncivilised character to the Luo community as a group - ethnic contempt under the NCIC standard.

text: @HonOscarSudi Kalenjin presidency is always a curse to the nation NEVER AGAIN Kasongo should be the last
label: hate
rationale: 'Kalenjin presidency is always a curse' declares the entire community categorically unfit to lead - direct match for example ex11, NCIC ethnic contempt.

text: @jeff_waweru9543 @OlivestarW12092 @Dr_AustinOmondi Lakini luhyias shida yao they can easily be bought,Kwanza wa bungoma na kakamega
label: hate
rationale: 'luhyias shida yao they can easily be bought' attributes collective corruptibility to Luhyas from Bungoma and Kakamega as a group - ethnic contempt under the NCIC standard.

text: RT @jimNjue_: RUTO NI ADUI WA KIPSIGIS ANATUUWA ANGRY KALENJIN MAN INFRONT OF GACHAGUA.
label: neither
rationale: 'RUTO NI ADUI WA KIPSIGIS' is harsh criticism of a named politician for acts against a community - attack on Ruto, not contempt directed at an ethnic group.

text: @A_Njambi TUTAM. You kikuyus kwendeni huko. Kenya belongs to all other tribes. Wait for 2027. We will show you tugeges
label: hate
rationale: 'You kikuyus kwendeni huko' is a collective expulsion call against the Kikuyu community, and 'tugeges' (we will beat/thrash you) adds a violence threat.

text: @wangari_mm Endelea na matusi. Ile siku Kasongo and Farouk will remind you wewe ni mkabila, don't come to Wamunyoro for next steps. Upambane na hali yako. I hate kikuyus who don't value the hard work our community grassroot leader RG does to keep us all safe so you can spew nonsense online.
label: hate
rationale: 'I hate kikuyus who don't value...' extends contempt to a broad class of Kikuyus collectively, and 'don't come to Wamunyoro' implies exclusion of a Kikuyu addressee - ethnic targeting under the NCIC standard.

text: #RutosMegaProjects we warned Kales @Aaroncheruiyot @ckositany @scherargei @SingoeiAKorir @koske_felix @kipmurkomen @KoechNelsonK kwamba @HonMoses_Kuria is a political prostitute hata anaweza peana mkundu yake - now see how kuria has destroyed @WilliamsRuto 2027 plans weta
label: offensive
rationale: 'political prostitute hata anaweza peana mkundu yake' is sexually crude personal abuse directed at Moses Kuria as an individual, with no contempt transferred to his ethnic community.

text: @Honcalebamisi Just like you, Luhya politicians are selfish and jealous of one another. By uniting behind and supporting one strong leader, your people become stronger and have greater bargaining power. That's the harsh reality.
label: hate
rationale: 'Luhya politicians are selfish and jealous of one another' attributes a negative character trait collectively to Luhya politicians as a group - ethnic contempt under the NCIC standard, though framed as political advice.

text: @KenyanSays Kenyans are cowards
label: neither
rationale: Generic critical generalisation about Kenyans as citizens, not an ethnic, tribal, or racial community - no protected characteristic targeted.

text: @hardtruths_101 Wajaluo si mna shida kubwa ya self-esteem waaah!...imagine hizo ni cabinet sits 2 ama 3 na kiburi imejaa. Shida yenu ni wakikuyu huko mashambani wenye hata hawako kwa Serikal?
label: hate
rationale: 'Wajaluo si mna shida kubwa ya self-esteem' attributes a collective psychological defect (excessive pride/low self-esteem) to Luos as a group - ethnic contempt under the NCIC standard.

text: @OleItumbi Seems Kikuyus are expensive
label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyus are expensive' attributes collective mercenary character to Kikuyus as a group - mild ethnic contempt under the NCIC standard (venal/for-sale characterisation of an entire community).

text: @Nyangande_ @gpdkaluma Many Luos have small iq and very jealous people. No wander Rao failed 5 times.... FIVE 🤣 #SisiNdioSifuna
label: hate
rationale: 'Many Luos have small iq and very jealous people' attributes collective low intelligence and jealousy to Luos as a group - ethnic contempt under the NCIC standard.

text: bu paraguaylılar da çok kaba saba adamlar yahu
label: hate
rationale: Turkish: 'these Paraguayans are very rough/uncouth people' - collective negative character attribution to a national-origin group, NCIC standard applies to national origin.

text: @omwambaKE Africans are greedy in nature, we are all suffering almost the same problems moreso black Africans
label: hate
rationale: 'Africans are greedy in nature' attributes an immutable negative characteristic collectively to a racial/continental group - ethnic contempt under the NCIC standard.

text: @KarisKhali @RodgersKipembe 😂😂 its not about numbers, the post says MERUS WILL NOT FOLLOW KIKUYUS BLINDLY.
label: neither
rationale: Ethnic-bloc electoral autonomy claim - asserting Merus' independent political agency without contempt for either group.

text: @Ceaser_X6 @HEBabuOwino And Sifuna is a Kikuyu. Uhuru must be such tribal!!!
label: neither
rationale: Criticism of Uhuru Kenyatta as an individual for alleged tribalism - target is a named politician, contempt is not transferred onto Kikuyus as a group.

text: @HenryAtemi @HonKangata Kenya is a very tribal nation. They just follow anyone without critical thinking just because he's their kingpin.The same reason Luos are blindly following 87 year old and incoherent Oburu
label: hate
rationale: 'Luos are blindly following' attributes collective absence of critical thinking to Luos as a group - ethnic contempt under the NCIC standard, even though framed as political commentary.

text: Na wakikuyu mjue, Edwin Watenya Sifuna si Raila Odinga na wala si kibii ama kihii,Ile war mlikuwa mkiona wajaluo kwetu musijaribu,we are far worse animals that Luos.
label: hate
rationale: 'we are far worse animals than Luos' self-dehumanises while threatening Kikuyus collectively, and 'ile war ... musijaribu' is a direct collective violence threat against Kikuyus as a group.

text: Entitled Kikuyus are supporting Noisemaker Sifuna not because they believe he can beat president Ruto but they want to use him to drag Luo's and luhyas out of government.
label: hate
rationale: 'Entitled Kikuyus' attributes a collective manipulative and scheming character to Kikuyus as a group - ethnic contempt under the NCIC standard.

text: ....na wakati na watu raundi hii wamechanuka. Goons ndio kidogo wamebakia na upuzi na ujinga. Uliona juzi Keumbu, wakisii mwenye wanasemekana kulipwa wakiuwa Vincent alias mapinduzi, mkisii mwezao kwa rally ya linda mwananchi. 4/4
label: hate
rationale: 'wakisii mwenye wanasemekana kulipwa wakiuwa Vincent' alleges Kisii members were paid to kill a named individual - attributes collective violence-for-hire to an ethnic community.
